message:
fix(window): eliminate UI thread stalls with non-blocking appearance cache

Decouple synchronous appearance queries from async xdg-desktop-portal D-Bus
calls. Add get_appearance_if_cached() for hot-path synchronous access and
refresh_appearance_in_background() for detached async cache updates. Callers
on wayland and x11 now use cached values with background refresh on miss,
preventing UI thread blocking.

Includes unit tests for cache staleness/freshness logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
